title: Game Stats
subtitle: A repository for game data such as mobs, titles, items, and related records
description: A structured repository for storing and organizing game-related data such as mobs, titles, items, and other records.
Designed to make game data easier to manage, expand, and reference across connected systems.
features: Centralized storage for multiple game data types
Easier lookup and organization of stat-based records
Built to support expansion as more game systems are added
statusDetails: Project structure is still being developed
Core data categories are being organized
Designed for future expansion into connected systems
